archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) inverted for Dark Mode
description: A mobile-first wellness and routine app with a calming dark mode. Uses 'Neo-Brutalist' clean layouts but softened with curved geometries, pastel typography accents, and deep plum-tinted charcoal backgrounds to reduce cognitive load and evoke tranquility.

rules: Headlines must use tracking-tight for a modern, compact look.
H1 size capped at text-4xl on mobile, text-5xl on desktop.
Use font-medium or font-semibold for headings, avoid font-black to maintain the calming vibe.
Subtle uppercase overlines (text-xs tracking-[0.2em]) for categories like News and Diary tags.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#14121A] pb-24 relative overflow-x-hidden text-[#F8F7FA]

bottom_tab_bar.style: Fixed bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-md z-50 pb-safe pt-4 px-6 flex justify-around items-center
bottom_tab_bar.background: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#1F1D29]/85 border-t border-white/5
bottom_tab_bar.interaction: Active tab uses pastel purple color and a subtle dot or line indicator. Inactive tabs use text_secondary. Icons from lucide-react.

cards.style: bg-[#1F1D29] rounded-3xl p-5 border border-[#ffffff14] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#C4B5FD] text-[#14121A] font-semibold rounded-full py-4 px-6 hover:bg-[#A7F3D0] transition-colors w-full flex justify-center items-center
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C4B5FD] text-[#C4B5FD] rounded-full py-4 px-6 w-full flex justify-center items-center
buttons.icon_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white flex justify-center items-center

todo_list.item: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-[#1F1D29] rounded-2xl mb-3 border border-[#ffffff14]
todo_list.checkbox: w-6 h-6 rounded-full border-2 border-[#C4B5FD] flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-all shrink-0
todo_list.delete_action: text-[#FDA4AF] opacity-80 hover:opacity-100 p-2 shrink-0 cursor-pointer

toast_motivation.style: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-[#A7F3D0] text-[#14121A] px-6 py-3 rounded-full shadow-lg font-medium text-sm flex items-center gap-2 z-50 whitespace-nowrap

forms_and_inputs.style: w-full bg-[#14121A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 text-[#F8F7FA] placeholder:text-[#9CA3AF] focus:border-[#C4B5FD] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C4B5FD] transition-all outline-none

pages_structure.auth: Clean layout. Logo centered. Welcome back message in pastel purple. Minimal inputs. Large rounded-full 'Entrar' button.
pages_structure.minha_rotina: Header 'Minha Rotina' with current date. Clean To-Do list below. FAB or inline input for new tasks.
pages_structure.mundo_hoje: Categorized feed. Horizontal scroll/tabs for categories (Política, Economia, Boas Notícias). Vertical stack of news cards. Cards have an AI summary icon.
pages_structure.diario_foco: Three sections: Gratitude input area, Reading progress (Book title + page input), Meditation block (Timer with large glowing circle in mint/purple). Bottom 'Salvar Dia' button.

micro_animations.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up on mount.
micro_animations.checkbox: Scale bump on check, text line-through with opacity reduction.

icons: lucide-react (Use regular weight, avoid filled icons unless active in tab bar)

testing.rule: ALL interactive elements must use data-testid attributes.

image_urls.description: Used as an extremely low opacity (5-10%) blur behind the app's top header to give a subtle pastel ambiance without looking like 'AI slop'. Use with absolute positioning and backdrop-blur-3xl or CSS blur.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure mobile-first approach by wrapping the main routing element in a max-w-md mx-auto container.
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for main structure. Custom Shadcn components are fine if stripped of generic styles to match these pastel-dark rules.
Do NOT use pure white/black. Use the specified custom hex codes.
Apply data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and tabs.
Implement the toast notification logic securely.
